name: shofer-router
description: VSCode extension providing direct access to multiple LLM providers with composite model failover — no external router service required

apiKey.description: API key for provider authentication (stored securely via SecretStorage)

commands.title: Shofer Router: Refresh Models
commands.description: Refresh the list of available models

commands.title: Shofer Router: Import Config
commands.description: Import provider API keys and settings from a config object or JSON file

commands.title: Shofer Router: Export Config
commands.description: Export the current router config (which providers are keyed + non-secret settings)

commands.title: Shofer Router: Show Metrics
commands.description: Show per-model cost, latency, and reliability metrics

commands.title: Shofer Router: Show Model Stats
commands.description: Show detailed statistics for a specific model

commands.title: Shofer Router: Export Metrics (Prometheus)
commands.description: Export current metrics in Prometheus text format

commands.title: Shofer Router: Show Composite Distribution
commands.description: Show load-balancing distribution for a composite model

commands.title: Shofer Router: Show Cost History
commands.description: Show cost breakdown by model across a selected time range

commands.title: Shofer Router: Configure Composite Models
commands.description: Configure composite (shofer/*) models with a visual editor

shofer.router.enabled.description: Enable or disable the Shofer Router extension

shofer.router.compositeModelsFile.description: Path to a JSON file defining composite (shofer/*) models

shofer.router.webviewDevServer.description: Vite dev server URL for webview development (e.g. http://localhost:5173)

shofer.router.customProviders.description: Inline JSON defining custom primary providers

shofer.router.experimental.prometheusEnd.description: Experimental: expose a Prometheus metrics scrape endpoint on 127.0.0.1 (port via SHOFER_ROUTER_METRICS_PORT, default 30098). Loopback-only, no auth.
